views.name: TodayView
views.purpose: Main single-scroll hydration hub. Top hero section: large circular progress ring (animated fill from 0% to current progress) displaying current intake in ml at center, daily goal below, and a subtle celebration burst animation when goal is reached. Beneath the ring: remaining ml counter that counts down toward zero. Middle section: horizontal row of quick-add preset buttons styled as tappable capsules — Small Glass (200ml), Glass (250ml), Large Glass (350ml), Bottle (500ml) — each with a drop.fill icon scaled proportionally. Below presets: a drink type selector strip (Water/Coffee/Tea/Juice/Other with icons) that applies to the next quick-add tap, plus a 'Custom' button that opens CustomEntrySheet for arbitrary amounts. Below entry controls: today's intake timeline — a vertical list of logged entries showing time, amount, drink type icon, and drink name, with swipe-to-delete. Bottom section: 7-day bar chart with each bar colored by goal completion (green if met goal, muted if not), horizontal dashed line at goal level, current streak badge with flame icon, and weekly average stat.

views.name: CustomEntrySheet
views.purpose: Compact modal sheet for logging a custom hydration amount. Stepper control for amount in ml with range 50–2000 and step size 50, displaying the current value prominently with unit label. Small visual cup-fill indicator that rises proportionally as amount increases. Drink type picker displayed as a horizontal icon grid with labels. Large 'Log Drink' button at the bottom in hubPrimary color. Sheet auto-dismisses after successful log.

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayIntake
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Sum of all entry amounts in ml where entry date falls within today (calendar day)

viewModelComputedProperties.name: goalProgress
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Double(todayIntake) / Double(dailyGoal) — used for ring progress animation. Can exceed 1.0 when over-hydrated.

viewModelComputedProperties.name: remainingMl
viewModelComputedProperties.description: max(0, dailyGoal - todayIntake) — ml still needed to reach today's goal

viewModelComputedProperties.name: todayEntries
viewModelComputedProperties.description: All entries with today's date, sorted by date descending so most recent appears first in timeline

viewModelComputedProperties.name: currentStreak
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Count of consecutive days ending at today (or yesterday if today is incomplete) where the day's total intake met or exceeded dailyGoal. A day with no entries or intake below goal breaks the streak.

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyData
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Aggregated total intake per day for the last 7 calendar days including today, used to render the weekly bar chart

viewModelComputedProperties.name: weeklyAverage
viewModelComputedProperties.description: Average daily intake in ml over the last 7 days, computed as sum of weeklyData totals / 7

viewModelComputedProperties.name: dailyGoal
viewModelComputedProperties.description: User-configurable daily hydration target in ml, persisted via UserDefaults with key 'hydrationDailyGoal'. Editable by tapping the goal value on the main view.

dailyGoal.description: Target daily water intake in milliliters. Tapping the goal number on the progress ring opens an inline editor (stepper with range 500–5000, step 250). Stored in UserDefaults under key 'hydrationDailyGoal'.

domainLogic.streakDefinition: A day qualifies for the streak if its total logged intake >= dailyGoal. The streak counts consecutive qualifying calendar days ending at today (if today qualifies) or yesterday (if today is still in progress and hasn't met the goal yet). Any non-qualifying day breaks the streak and resets the count to zero.
domainLogic.trendAnalysis: Compare current 7-day rolling average to the previous 7-day rolling average. Display percentage change with a green up-arrow or red down-arrow. Track goal completion rate as (days meeting goal in last 30 days) / (days with at least one entry in last 30 days) as a percentage.
insights: Goal completion rate: percentage of tracked days in the last 30 days where total intake met or exceeded the daily goal
Best streak: longest consecutive streak ever achieved, stored persistently and compared against current streak
Average daily intake: rolling 7-day average displayed on the weekly chart, plus 30-day average available on long-press
Peak hydration hour: bucket logged entries into morning (6-12), afternoon (12-18), evening (18-24), night (0-6) and show which period has the most entries
Drink type breakdown: percentage of total weekly ml attributed to each DrinkType, displayed as a mini donut chart or legend below the weekly bar chart
